allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggestions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer gsk_test" -d '{"transcript":"test","prompt":"p","model":"m"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggestions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer gsk_test_12345" -d '{"transcript":"hello world","prompt":"test {TRANSCRIPT}","model":"openai/gpt-oss-120b"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggestions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer gsk_test" --data-binary "@/tmp/big.json")
Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggestions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer gsk_test" --data-binary "@/tmp/big.json")
Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggestions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer gsk_test" --data-binary "@big.json")
